guide_structure_mod_app: app/ — Android application built with Kotlin, includes Live Wallpaper, chat interface, and Push receiver
guide_structure_mod_backend: backend/ — Node.js + Express backend deployed on Railway, handles API, database, and OpenClaw platform communication
guide_structure_mod_play: google_play/ — Google Play Store listing assets (icons, feature graphics)
guide_structure_mod_portal: backend/public/ — Web Portal frontend providing cross-device entity management interface
guide_structure_mod_tests: backend/tests/ — Regression test suite ensuring Bot API and broadcast functionality work correctly
guide_testing_note_env: Tests require TEST_DEVICE_ID / BROADCAST_TEST_DEVICE_ID + BROADCAST_TEST_DEVICE_SECRET to be set in backend/.env.
guide_testing_li_3: Open an Issue for discussion before submitting a PR
guide_testing_li_branch: Create a feature branch: git checkout -b feat/your-feature
